draft_v1: {"schema_v":1,"recipe":{"title":"THE BEST CORN CHOWDER","description":"NOTE : Buy the absolute freshest corn you can find, and use it the day you bring it home.","yield_phrase":"6"},"steps":[{"instruction":"","ingredient_lines":[{"raw_ingredient_text":"6 ears corn, husks and silks removed"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"6 cups homemade or low-sodium canned chicken stock"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"1 bay leaf"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"1 teaspoon fennel seeds"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"1 teaspoon coriander seeds"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"1 teaspoon whole black peppercorns"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"4 ounces salt pork or slab bacon, cut into 1/2-inch cubes (optional)"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"3 tablespoons unsalted butter"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"1 medium onion, finely diced (about 1 cup)"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"2 medium cloves garlic, minced or grated on a Microplane (about 2 teaspoons)"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"1 to 2 russet (baking) potatoes, peeled and cut into 1/2-inch dice (about 11/2 cups)"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"Kosher salt"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"2 cups whole milk or half-and-half"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"Freshly ground black pepper"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"Sugar (if necessary)"},{"raw_ingredient_text":"3 scallions, finely sliced"}]}]}
